mechanism: Clustered downgrades of $350-500B BBB could exceed HY market's $1.3-1.5T absorption capacity, causing broad spread widening. IG mandate-driven forced selling creates predictable 8-15% underperformance that temporarily dislocates credit pricing.
regime_dependence: Activated by BBB downgrade waves. Distributed downgrades are absorbed orderly; clustered downgrades overwhelm HY market capacity. Ford/GM 2005 template.
